data.title: EverQuote to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 4, 2026
data.description: Today, in Cambridge, Massachusetts, EverQuote, Inc. (Nasdaq: EVER), a prominent online insurance marketplace, disclosed its plan to unveil first quarter financial results on Monday, May 4, 2026, after the market closes. During a conference call and webcast at 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day, the company's management will elaborate on the financial results, recent advancements, and business prospects.

data.title: Mama's Creations Reports Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results
data.description: In the fourth quarter, the revenue saw a significant growth of 61%, reaching $54.0 million. Net income also saw a notable increase, rising by 38% to reach $2.2 million. The adjusted EBITDA for the same period was reported at $5.5 million. In fiscal year 2026, the cash position nearly tripled to $20.0 million, reflecting a substantial financial improvement for the company.

data.title: Cricut to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 5, 2026
data.description: Cricut, Inc., a leading creative technology company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol CRCT, has disclosed plans to reveal its financial performance for the first quarter ending March 31, 2026, subsequent to the closure of U.S. markets on Tuesday, May 5, 2026. The company, headquartered in South Jordan, Utah, has catered to a vast global user base with its innovative platform for crafting. To delve into the details of the financial outcomes, Cricut's management will conduct a conference call and webcast at 3:00 p.m. Mountain Time (5:00 p.m. Eastern Time) on the same afternoon.

data.title: Structure Therapeutics Appoints Matthew Lang, J.D. as Chief Operating Officer and General Counsel
data.description: On April 14, 2026, Structure Therapeutics Inc. (NASDAQ: GPCR), a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company working on oral small molecule therapeutics for metabolic diseases like obesity, appointed Matthew Lang, J.D. as their Chief Operating Officer and General Counsel. Lang brings over fifteen years of executive experience in global biopharmaceutical firms, with a background in legal matters, corporate strategy, compliance, risk management, and business development.

data.title: Rocket Lab Completes Mynaric Acquisition, Adding Laser Optical Communications To Growing Space Systems Portfolio
data.description: Rocket Lab has successfully finalized the purchase of Mynaric AG, a prominent supplier of laser optical communication terminals for various platforms including air, space, and mobile industries. This acquisition marks a significant move in the sector, with the deal amounting to approximately [insert number] million. Rocket Lab aims to leverage Mynaric AG's expertise to enhance its offerings and expand its capabilities in the rapidly evolving communication technology market.

data.title: Two-Thirds of California Small Business Owners Want a Subscription Lawyer -- They Just Don't Know It Exists Yet
data.description: A recent study of 400 entrepreneurs in California highlights a significant need for cost-effective and continuous legal assistance, along with a notable openness to utilizing artificial intelligence. The survey, carried out by Kolmogorov Law in April 2026, showed that the majority of small business owners expressed frustration at the lack of affordable legal resources. Additionally, the findings revealed that many of the participants were receptive to the idea of incorporating AI technology into their legal processes.

data.title: KBRA Assigns Preliminary Ratings to A&D Mortgage Trust 2026-NQM3 (ADMT 2026-NQM3)
data.description: In New York, KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to 10 classes of mortgage pass-through certificates from ADMT 2026-NQM3. This transaction, valued at $424.1 million, is a non-prime RMBS sponsored by Atlas A&D Opportunity Fund III LP. The majority of the loans in this deal were originated by A&D Mortgage, LLC or its corresponding entities. The underlying collateral consists of 945 residential mortgages, with a notable focus on loans underwritten using alternative income sources.

data.title: Altus Group unveils ARGUS Assist, the first AI-powered experience within the ARGUS Intelligence platform
data.description: ARGUS Assist was highlighted at the Altus Connect conference, where it drew attention for its innovative features. The event, which featured numerous industry experts and participants, showcased the efficiency of ARGUS Assist in providing essential support services. With a turnout of over 500 attendees, the conference served as a platform for showcasing the benefits of ARGUS Assist in streamlining processes and enhancing overall operational effectiveness. Attendees were particularly impressed by its user-friendly interface and comprehensive functionalities, making it a standout solution in the market. ARGUS Assist's standout capabilities were a major talking point at the conference, with its potential for revolutionizing support services across various sectors becoming a key highlight of the event.

data.title: Saratoga Investment Corp. to Report Fiscal Fourth Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Hold Conference Call
data.description: Saratoga Investment Corp. (NYSE:SAR), a business development company, is set to release its financial results for the fiscal quarter ending on February 28, 2026, on May 5, 2026, after the market closes. Following this, a conference call to review the financial results is scheduled for May 6, 2026. Investors and interested parties can participate in the conference call for an in-depth discussion regarding the company's performance during this period.

data.title: Nordea Bank Abp: Repurchase of own shares on 14.04.2026
data.description: On April 14, 2026, Nordea Bank Abp announced changes in its own shares through a stock exchange release. The company completed the repurchase of its own shares (ISIN: FI4000297767) on the same day at 22:30 EET. The trading venue for the repurchases was not specified in the release. Nordea Bank Abp, identified by LEI 529900ODI3047E2LIV03, undertook this action as part of its share buyback program. This move reflects the company's strategic decisions regarding its capital structure and financial management.

data.title: U.S. Air Force Selects Accrete's Argus Platform to Help Reduce FOCI Risk in Foreign Investment and Real Estate Acquisitions
data.description: Accrete, Inc., a leading AI company from New York specializing in Knowledge Engines, disclosed on April 14, 2026, that it has been chosen by the U.S. Air Force for its platform. This decision aims to minimize the risk of foreign ownership, control, or influence (FOCI) in overseas investments.

data.title: In HelloNation, Insurance Expert Bill Pancake of Kissimmee, FL, Explains Why Renters Insurance Matters
data.description: In Kissimmee, Florida on April 14, 2026, an article on HelloNation discusses the importance of renters insurance for individuals who do not own valuable items. The piece features input from Insurance Expert Bill Pancake of Bill Pancake Insurance Agency, Inc. in Kissimmee. The article explores whether renters insurance is a crucial investment, shedding light on the topic for readers.
